heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Vittorio De Sica. Written by Vittorio De Sica, Cesare Zavattini, Suso Cecchi d'Amico, Gerardo Guerrieri, Oreste Biancoli, and Adolfo Franci, based on a novel by Luigi Bartolini.
clean: Directed by Vittorio De Sica. Written by Vittorio De Sica, Cesare Zavattini, Suso Cecchi d'Amico, Gerardo Guerrieri, Oreste Biancoli, and Adolfo Franci, based on a novel by Luigi Bartolini.

heading: Antonio Ricci
raw: Why should I kill myself worrying when I'll end up just as dead?
clean: Why should I kill myself worrying when I'll end up just as dead?

heading: Antonio Ricci
raw: There's a cure for everything except death.
clean: There's a cure for everything except death.

heading: Antonio Ricci
raw: You live and you suffer.
clean: You live and you suffer.

heading: Antonio Ricci
raw: I've been cursed since the day I was born.
clean: I've been cursed since the day I was born.

heading: Antonio Ricci
raw: Your mother and her prayers can't help us.
clean: Your mother and her prayers can't help us.

heading: Antonio Ricci
raw: [to Bruno] Do you fancy a pizza? Come on, then! Come on, let's go! What the hell. We might as well go out in style. What's the point in worrying about it all?
clean: Do you fancy a pizza? Come on, then! Come on, let's go! What the hell. We might as well go out in style. What's the point in worrying about it all?

heading: Other
raw: The Beggar: I mind my own business, I bother nobody, and what do I get? Trouble.
clean: I mind my own business, I bother nobody, and what do I get? Trouble.

heading: Dialogue
raw: La Santona: [Addressing a young man seated before her, apparently seeking advice on his love life] You must plant your seeds in another field. Do you understand what I mean?
clean: You must plant your seeds in another field. Do you understand what I mean?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Young man: No, I don't understand.
clean: No, I don't understand.

heading: Dialogue
raw: La Santona: It's simple, my boy. What good is planting seeds if the soil rejects them? You plant, but don't gather. Understand?
clean: It's simple, my boy. What good is planting seeds if the soil rejects them? You plant, but don't gather. Understand?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Young man: I haven't understood a word.
clean: I haven't understood a word.

heading: Dialogue
raw: La Santona: [Becoming impatient] She doesn't love you! Forget her! [Pausing for effect] Dear boy, you're very ugly. Yes, ugly. There are so many other women... Go and plow another field!
clean: She doesn't love you! Forget her! Dear boy, you're very ugly. Yes, ugly. There are so many other women... Go and plow another field!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Employment Officer: Hey, Ricci, remember your bike! You have to have a bike.
clean: Hey, Ricci, remember your bike! You have to have a bike.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Antonio Ricci: A bike? I have and I haven't. I can't get my hands on it right now. Perhaps in a few days time.
clean: A bike? I have and I haven't. I can't get my hands on it right now. Perhaps in a few days time.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Employment Officer: You need one straight away or they won't take you on.
clean: You need one straight away or they won't take you on.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Antonio Ricci: I can do it on foot for the first few days.
clean: I can do it on foot for the first few days.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Employment Officer: If you haven't got a bike, you'll have to let someone else take it.
clean: If you haven't got a bike, you'll have to let someone else take it.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Employment Officer: Have you got a bike or haven't you?
clean: Have you got a bike or haven't you?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Antonio Ricci: I've got one. I've got one.
clean: I've got one. I've got one.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Employment Officer: Remember if you haven't got a bike, there's nothing doing, right?
clean: Remember if you haven't got a bike, there's nothing doing, right?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Antonio Ricci: Think I'm going to wait another two years? I'll be there with a bike.
clean: Think I'm going to wait another two years? I'll be there with a bike.

heading: Dialogue
raw: La Santona: What have they stolen?
clean: What have they stolen?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Antonio Ricci: My bike.
clean: My bike.

heading: Dialogue
raw: La Santona: What can I say? I can only tell you what I see. Listen: you'll find it straight away or not at all. Understand? You'll find it straight away or not at all. Keep your eyes open.
clean: What can I say? I can only tell you what I see. Listen: you'll find it straight away or not at all. Understand? You'll find it straight away or not at all. Keep your eyes open.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Antonio Ricci: Where, straight away?
clean: Where, straight away?

heading: Dialogue
raw: La Santona: How should I know? Go and try to understand what I said. You'll find it straight away or not at all.
clean: How should I know? Go and try to understand what I said. You'll find it straight away or not at all.
